title: Bror Tower Four
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Bror Tower Four''' was a building on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] presumably controlled by the [[Commerce Guild/Legends|Commerce Guild]] prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. It connected to [[Bror Tower Three]] via a walkway at their 166th floors.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Approaching Storm]]''
*[[The Approaching Storm (abridged audiobook)|''The Approaching Storm'' abridged audiobook]]

{{Interlang
|de=Bror-Turm Vier
